Video.summary: Michael shows us how to make his warm regional dishes like bagna cauda.
Video.title: Piemonte

Video.summary: Michael explores the diversity of the Italian region Calabria.
Video.title: Calabria

Video.summary: Michael prepares classics like margherita pizza and fried seafood.
Video.title: Campania

Video.summary: Michael prepares dishes from the culinary heart of Italy.
Video.title: Emilia Romagna

Video.summary: Michael makes simple, flavorful dishes from the rustic Italian region, Umbria.
Video.title: Umbria

Video.summary: Michael celebrates the food of the Italian Riviera as he shares dishes from Liguria.
Video.title: Liguria

Video.summary: Chef Michael Bonacini uses the fresh ingredients from rich Tuscan soil to make regional dishes.
Video.title: Tuscany

Video.summary: Michael prepares classic dishes inspired by the central Italian region, Le Marche.
Video.title: Le Marche

Video.summary: Rice balls stuffed with seafood are on the menu as Michael explores dishes from Sicily.
Video.title: Sicily

Video.summary: Michael shows us diverse regional recipes like rolled meat crepes.
Video.title: Abruzzo

Video.summary: Michael's culinary tour of the Italian region of Trentino-Alto Adige from his own kitchen.
Video.title: Trentino-Alto Adige

Video.summary: Michael prepares traditional dishes from the Northern Italian region, Lombardy.
Video.title: Lombardy

Video.summary: Michael prepares cuisine from Veneto, Italy.
Video.title: Veneto

Video.summary: Michael prepares classic dishes from Italy's Lazio region.
Video.title: Lazio

Video.summary: Chef Michael Bonacini explores the bold and hearty flavours of the southern region of Basilicata with dishes like Pollo Alla Potentina.
Video.title: Basilicata
